CREATE TABLE another_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value BIGINT);
INSERT INTO another_table (id, value) SELECT id, num FROM (SELECT generate_series(1, 10) AS id, generate_series(1, 10) AS num) AS sub;
SELECT a.id, a.value, b.num FROM another_table a JOIN test_series b ON a.id = b.num;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_series WHERE num BETWEEN 5 AND 7;
CREATE TABLE multiple_series AS SELECT generate_series(1, 5) AS series1, generate_series(10, 15) AS series2;
SELECT series1, series2 FROM multiple_series WHERE series1 + series2 < 20;
WITH series_data AS (SELECT generate_series(1, 100) AS num) SELECT AVG(num) FROM series_data WHERE num % 2 = 0;
SELECT MAX(num) FROM test_series WHERE num > 0;
